title: MoreTools+
description: MoreTools+ expands Minecraft by adding new functionality to previously unused materials, turning them into powerful tools and armor.
body:
# **🌟 MoreTools+ 🌟** #
_This mod is currently in **beta** – expect some bugs! 🐞_

**The project was originally created for NeoForge 1.21.1; some of the updated versions will not be released for other versions**
##
### 🔧 Revamp Your Minecraft Experience! 🔧 ###
**MoreTools+** breathes new life into Minecraft by turning forgotten, unused materials into powerful **tools** and **armor!** ⛏️⚔️

### 💡 What’s New? ###

- **Copper, Redstone, Obsidian,** and other overlooked resources are now craftable into unique gear! 🧱
- Expand your **crafting** options and unleash the potential of these previously useless items! 💥
- Perfect for **explorers** and **fighters** looking for fresh ways to enhance their gameplay. 🌍🏹
  
###  🛠️ Key Features 🛠️
- **New Tools & Armor**: Craft unique sets with new materials ⚙️
- **Expanded Crafting**: Make use of resources that had no prior functionality ✨
- **Strategic Gameplay**: Turn basic materials into game-changing items 💎
##
### 🚀 Get Ready for Adventure! 🚀

Whether you're a **miner, builder,** or **adventurer,** **MoreTools+** gives you new ways to tackle your world with upgraded gear! 💪

🔥 **Start your new journey today with MoreTools+** 🔥
Download now and discover endless possibilities in your Minecraft world! 🌟

_**(Please note: The mod is in beta, my discord we’d love to hear your feedback and bug reports! DemSlayer📝)**_
